answers.label: High School Student / No degree yet
I like solving complex problems and thinking analytically
Primarily financial — I want to maximise earnings

milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in data engineer to build a strong learning foundation

resources.title: IBM Data Engineering Professional Certificate on Coursera
Preparing for the Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer Exam Specialization on Coursera
AWS Certified Data Engineer - Associate (DE-A) Ultimate Prep Course on Udemy
Microsoft Azure Data Engineer Associate Professional Certificate on edX
Databricks Certified Data Engineer Associate Certification

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in python and sql, etl/elt pipeline development, and data warehousing (snowflake, bigquery, redshift) — these are the essential building blocks for a data engineer

resources.title: Mode Analytics SQL Tutorial
Python Data Science Handbook by Jake VanderPlas
Data Warehouse Concepts, Design, and Data Integration (Coursera)
AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials (Official AWS Training)
Apache Spark Programming with Python (Databricks Academy)

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in apache spark and hadoop, cloud platforms (aws, azure, gcp), and data modelling, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: Delta Lake Documentation & Tutorials
Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer Specialization (Coursera)
Confluent Developer Tutorials: Apache Kafka and Streaming Applications
Apache Airflow Documentation: Advanced DAG Authoring & Production Deployment
Snowflake University: Data Engineering and Data Warehousing Courses

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing software projects, open-source contributions, or technical prototypes — focus on applying python and sql, and etl/elt pipeline development in realistic scenarios

resources.title: Databricks Academy - Data Engineering Learning Plan
Apache Airflow Official Documentation & Tutorials
dbt Learn - Fundamentals Course
AWS Glue Developer Guide and Examples
Preparing for Google Cloud Certification: Cloud Data Engineer Professional Certificate

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a professional portfolio: publish your best projects on GitHub, create a personal website showcasing your work, and document your process and results

resources.title: DataTalks.Club Data Engineering Zoomcamp (Free Course)
How to Showcase Your Data Engineering Projects on GitHub Effectively
AWS Well-Architected Labs: Data Lake and Data Mesh Foundation
Data Project Documentation Best Practices (Towards Data Science)
Build a Data Lake with Cloud Storage and Dataproc (Google Cloud Tutorial)

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your data engineer skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: Writing a Compelling Tech Resume (LinkedIn Learning)
Optimizing Your LinkedIn Profile (LinkedIn Learning)
Google Career Certificates: Interviewing and Resume Writing in English (Coursera)
How to Build a Data Science Portfolio (No Experience Necessary) - freeCodeCamp

milestones.title: Job Application / Freelancing
milestones.description: Apply for data engineer positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews

milestones.title: Foundation & Core Skills
milestones.description:
(Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in data engineer to build a strong learning foundation

Then: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in python and sql, etl/elt pipeline development, and data warehousing (snowflake, bigquery, redshift) — these are the essential building blocks for a data engineer

milestones.title: Skill Building & Practice
milestones.description:
Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in apache spark and hadoop, cloud platforms (aws, azure, gcp), and data modelling, applying them through exercises and case studies

Then: Gain hands-on experience by completing software projects, open-source contributions, or technical prototypes — focus on applying python and sql, and etl/elt pipeline development in realistic scenarios

milestones.title: Portfolio & Professional Profile
milestones.description:
Build a professional portfolio: publish your best projects on GitHub, create a personal website showcasing your work, and document your process and results

Then: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your data engineer skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators
